title: Staff of Traveling
description: EnderIO's Staff of Traveling and Travel Anchors
body:
This mod adds the Staff of Traveling and Travel Anchors from EnderIO.
Ported from [Travel Anchors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/travel-anchors) (license: Apache 2.0, authors: CastCrafter, MelanX, noeppinoeppi).

## Features

Shift right click with a Staff of Traveling to do a short teleport forward (can go through blocks).
#### Travel Anchors
- Place a Travel Anchor and right click it (while not standing on it) to change its name
- Put a block in your offhand and right click a Travel Anchor with an empty main hand to disguise it as that block
- While holding a Staff of Traveling, right click in the direction of a Travel Anchor to teleport to it
- Stand on a Travel Anchor and right click with an empty hand in the direction of a another Travel Anchor to teleport to it
#### Elevator Mode
- Stand on a Travel Anchor and press Jump to teleport to a Travel Anchor directly above you
- Stand on a Travel Anchor and press Sneak to teleport to a Travel Anchor directly below you
Enchantments
- Enchant a weapon or digger item with Teleportation to make it act like a Staff of Traveling
- Enchant a Staff of Travelling with Range to increase the max range you can teleport to travel anchors

recipes in images tab.
